languages.text: Отпрыск Гапраков был убит на заставе выстрелом из плазменного оружия. От тела избавились, сбросив его с обрыва. Необходимо найти виновного.

traits.locale_text: Отпрыск Гапраков был убит на заставе выстрелом из плазменного оружия. От тела избавились, сбросив его с обрыва. Необходимо найти виновного.

languages.text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.
languages.original_text: Отпрыск Гапраков был убит на заставе выстрелом из плазменного оружия. От тела избавились, сбросив его с обрыва. Необходимо найти виновного.

traits.locale_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by casting it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.
The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

languages.text: Der Gaprak-Spross wurde am Außenposten mit einer Plasmawaffe getötet. Die Leiche wurde in den Abgrund geworfen. Nun gilt es, den Schuldigen zu finden.
languages.original_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

traits.locale_text: Der Gaprak-Spross wurde am Außenposten mit einer Plasmawaffe getötet. Die Leiche wurde in den Abgrund geworfen. Nun gilt es, den Schuldigen zu finden.

languages.text: L'héritier des Gaprak a été tué à l'avant-poste par un tir d'arme à plasma. Le cadavre a été jeté dans le vide pour le faire disparaître. Le coupable doit impérativement être identifié.
languages.original_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

traits.locale_text: L'héritier des Gaprak a été tué à l'avant-poste par un tir d'arme à plasma. Le cadavre a été jeté dans le vide pour le faire disparaître. Le coupable doit impérativement être identifié.

languages.text: 贾帕克家族的子嗣在前哨被等离子武器射杀。尸体被扔下悬崖处理掉了。必须找出凶手。
languages.original_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

traits.locale_text: 贾帕克家族的子嗣在前哨被等离子武器射杀。尸体被扔下悬崖处理掉了。必须找出凶手。

languages.text: El heredero Gaprak fue asesinado en el puesto avanzado con un disparo de un arma de plasma. Se deshicieron del cadáver arrojándolo por el precipicio. Es preciso dar con el responsable de su muerte.
languages.original_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

traits.locale_text: El heredero Gaprak fue asesinado en el puesto avanzado con un disparo de un arma de plasma. Se deshicieron del cadáver arrojándolo por el precipicio. Es preciso dar con el responsable de su muerte.

languages.text: ガプラコフの子孫は前哨基地でプラズマ兵器の一撃で死んだ。遺体は崖から投げ捨てられて処理された。犯人を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: Gaprakov's offspring was killed at the outpost by a shot from a plasma weapon. The body was disposed of by throwing it off a cliff. The culprit must be found.

languages.text: Gaprak vârisi, karakolda bir plazma silahı ateşiyle öldürüldü. Ceset uçurumdan atılarak ortadan kaldırıldı. Suçlu bulunmalı.
languages.original_text: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.

traits.locale_text: Gaprak vârisi, karakolda bir plazma silahı ateşiyle öldürüldü. Ceset uçurumdan atılarak ortadan kaldırıldı. Suçlu bulunmalı.
